name: PDE5 inhibitor RCT meta-analysis found modest vascular surrogate improvements versus placebo
statement: A 2025 systematic review/meta-analysis of randomized trials found that PDE5 inhibitors as a class improved several vascular surrogate parameters versus placebo, including modest blood-pressure reductions and higher flow-mediated dilation, but it does not establish tadalafil-specific cardiovascular event prevention in healthy users.
population_or_context: Mixed PDE5 inhibitor RCT populations and vascular endpoints.
quantitative_note: Pooled estimates included SBP MD -2.80 mm Hg (95% CI -4.24 to -1.37), DBP MD -1.80 mm Hg (95% CI -2.37 to -1.22), PWV MD -0.75 cm/s (95% CI -1.01 to -0.49), FMD MD +2.47% (95% CI 1.24 to 3.71), and PSV MD +3.70 cm/s (95% CI 3.52 to 3.88).

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: Abstract reports included study count and pooled mean differences for vascular parameters.

caveats: Mixed populations, agents, doses, and endpoints.
Surrogate vascular markers do not prove lower MI, stroke, mortality, or longevity benefit.
population_profile: Mixed RCT populations; not direct for mostly healthy men age 30 to 50.
tadalafil_exposure: Mixed PDE5 inhibitors including tadalafil and non-tadalafil agents; tadalafil-specific subgroup not extracted here.
indication_context: Class-level vascular-function synthesis used as adjacent evidence.
endpoint_measure: Blood pressure, carotid intima-media thickness, pulse wave velocity, peak systolic velocity, flow-mediated dilation, endothelial progenitor cells, endothelial microparticles, augmentation index, brachial artery diameter, and reactive hyperemia index.
effect_estimate: PDE5 inhibitors improved several pooled surrogate vascular parameters, with modest SBP/DBP reductions and FMD increase.
safety_findings: Abstract does not synthesize tadalafil-specific safety; apply existing tadalafil safety and interaction baseline before using class efficacy signals.
directness_to_target_population: Low to moderate for broad PDE5 vascular surrogate plausibility; low for tadalafil-specific healthy-user clinical benefit.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Class pooling, heterogeneity, surrogate endpoints, possible publication/reporting bias, and no direct event-prevention conclusion.
class_transfer_limits: Supports PDE5 vascular plausibility only; tadalafil-specific conclusions still require tadalafil-specific dose, population, endpoint, and safety evidence.
